scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend "npm run dev -w @kavach-llm/frontend" "npm run dev -w @kavach-llm/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @kavach-llm/frontend && npm run build -w @kavach-llm/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @kavach-llm/frontend && npm run lint -w @kavach-llm/backend
